texto: ..the guests milled back and forth: men stood with their heads together, discussing politics and crops, their stiff white shirts puffed and ruffled, their voices rising and falling in steadfast opinions as women of fair whispered to one another and laughed behind silk fans, occasionally calling out gaily to pull another into their ring of white shoulder flounced with satin as house niggers dipped and weaved all around them bearing trays of syllabub and sack, almost invisible as the shadows they cast
explicacao: Orientação direta de Pamela Jekel sobre temas ligados a humor. A afirmação “..the guests milled back and forth: men stood with their heads together, discussing politics and …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, aristocracy, bayou, útil em momentos de bayou e old-south.
